name: Procedure rescheduling due to work
description: Patient needs to reschedule a colonoscopy due to a work conflict.
goal: Reschedule a colonoscopy originally set for this Friday to a later date.
behavior: Sound apologetic and slightly stressed due to the work conflict
Clearly state the need to reschedule and the urgency of doing so
Express willingness to accommodate the earliest available rescheduled date
success_criteria: Agent must confirm the cancellation of the original appointment
Agent should offer and confirm a new appointment date for the procedure
Agent should ensure the patient has all necessary information for the new appointment
orchestrator_hint: Patient needs to reschedule a procedure due to a sudden work obligation.
